workflow_name: Customer Renewal Email -> Forecast Impact + Path
user_message: Just came out of security posture with Lucerne Publishing. Turn this into my brief and pull out the asks.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Laura Anderson <laura.anderson@lucernepubli.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-28 14:47 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Lucerne Publishing security posture

Our team encountered some challenges with security posture. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Laura Anderson <laura.anderson@lucernepubli.com>
Date: 2024-01-19 12:10 EST
Subject: Follow-up: security posture Review

There's been a change in our timeline for security posture. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Lucerne Publishing: the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy

required_artifacts: path forward with MACC/funding options if applicable

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF35-D trap (Funding eligibility asserted as approved); produces complete Contract state summary with freshness, forecast impact with confidence, response draft (no commercia
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF35-D failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF35-D failure mode (Funding eligibility asserted as approved)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct security posture decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF35-D -- Funding eligibility asserted as approved
